pi_items.metadata_value: 100 triangles minimum difference between raw and cleaned STL

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the CT Cranium DICOM dataset (0051) from official InVesalius v3.0 releases, which is a real, public CT scan of a human skull containing 108 slices at 512x512 resolution with 0.478 mm pixel spacing. The total uncompressed size is 54.52 MB. The Bone preset threshold range of 226-3071 Hounsfield Units is verified as the standard bone segmentation threshold in medical imaging. The dataset is not synthetic; it is real medical imaging data originally acquired in 2002 and publicly distributed by the InVesalius project since v3.0.
